chunks.title: Call to the Land of Whirring Wings
chunks.reason: A prophetic address to a distant nation and all inhabitants of the earth regarding an impending sign.

chunks.title: Oracle of Yahweh's Quiet Judgment
chunks.reason: Yahweh reveals His plan to observe quietly and then prune the nation like a vineyard.

chunks.title: The Gift of Homage at Mount Zion
chunks.reason: A concluding narrative statement describing the future submission of the nation to Yahweh.
